# AERLUNE Air Purifier Independent Site

AERLUNE is a premium HEPA air purifier prototype website built for SEO, AEO, AI search and independent-store conversion.

Canonical site: https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/

Important pages:
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/index.html — brand homepage and product discovery
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/products.html — benchmark-mapped product collection
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/verified-data.html — data integrity and public benchmark disclosure
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/performance-testing.html — CADR, noise, filter and certification testing checklist
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/air-purifier-for-allergies.html — allergy air purifier guide
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/air-purifier-for-pets.html — pet-home air purifier guide
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/air-purifier-for-smoke.html — smoke and odor guide
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/bedroom-air-purifier.html — bedroom air purifier guide
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/large-room-air-purifier.html — large-room air purifier guide
- https://woshibaomihua.github.io/aerlune-airpurifier-site/oem-air-purifier-private-label.html — OEM/private label air purifier page

Data policy:
Public benchmark data is for market positioning only. Final AERLUNE commercial claims require verified factory lab reports, CADR test data, noise testing, certification documents and filter-grade evidence.
